channel.title: testing on kxsh

item.title: Testcontainers with Podman
item.description: I use Testcontainers for writing integration tests for my APIs. In particular, the tests concerning DBs - migrations, SQL queries. Currently, I replacing Docker with Podman as the preferred tool for managing Containers. Eventually, I stumbled upon the problem of configuring Testcontainers with Podman on my local machine. Here is what I discovered during the process of migration from Docker to Podman, with respect to Testcontainers: Problem Link to heading Testcontainers implicitly use Docker as the default container runtime.
